title: polypodium obtusissimum
intro: Polypodium obtusissimum, also known as the American polypody, is a type of fern native to North America, characterized by its leathery fronds and dark brown stems. Traditionally, Polypodium obtusissimum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and treating infections. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Polypodium obtusissimum is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, or topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
